_schema.creatures: list of creature objects; one per non-abstract class extending BaseCreature
_schema.creature.name: display Name set in constructor; null when randomized (see name_list)
_schema.creature.name_list: NameList.RandomName() list id when the name is randomized
_schema.creature.body: body id (int) or list of possible ids (Utility.RandomList)
_schema.creature.ai_type / fight_mode: from the base(AIType.X, FightMode.Y, ...) constructor call
_schema.creature.str/dex/int/hits/stam/mana: int, or [min, max] when SetX(min, max)
_schema.creature.loot.packs: [{pack: LootPack name, count}] from AddLoot in GenerateLoot
_schema.creature.loot.pack_items: item class names from simple PackItem(new X()) calls
_schema.creature.equipment: worn/wielded items from AddItem(new X()) calls (not loot); [{class, optional (in a switch/if/random block), hue_random (arg is Utility.Random*Hue())}]
_schema.creature.source: script path relative to the servuo root
